prompt: Optimize the algorithm efficiency in this Rust file. It has several functions with suboptimal time complexity — nested iterations that could use hash lookups, unnecessary sorting, and repeated recomputation. Apply the appropriate algorithm design paradigms to reduce complexity.
assertions: filtrar_existentes is refactored to use a HashSet (or similar O(1) lookup structure) instead of nested .any() iteration
ultimo_pago is refactored to use .max_by_key() or equivalent single-pass O(n) approach instead of sorting
totales_por_mes is refactored to use a single-pass grouping (HashMap) instead of rescanning pagos for each month
The code still compiles (no syntax errors introduced)
The output includes before/after Big-O complexity for each change
The output identifies which algorithm paradigm was applied for each fix
